blocks.text: rain Chases CS2 Major Glory as Norway's Stars Take Centre Stage
IEM Rio's knockout rounds hit crunch time as rain battles for the Major title. Friday doubles as a Norwegian showcase — Hovland at Hilton Head and Ruud grinding Barcelona clay.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 — rain chases CS2 Major title in Rio de Janeiro
⛳ RBC Heritage — Viktor Hovland hunting weekend contention at Hilton Head
🎾 Barcelona Open — Casper Ruud targets deep clay-court run
🏎️ STC Saudi Arabian Grand Prix — Antonelli leads championship, Russell and Leclerc chase
